opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't pull a full breath in — every time I try, a sharp knife stabs my ribs, and I've started coughing up little streaks of blood. My right calf has been swollen and really sore for a couple of days and now this has come on out of nowhere.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The chest pain and breathlessness came on suddenly about two hours ago while I was walking to the kitchen and it's getting worse — I'm frightened.

symptom_narrative.onset: the leg swelling started about 48 hours ago; the chest pain and breathlessness came on suddenly about 2 hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: leg 2 days, chest symptoms 2 hours and worsening
symptom_narrative.character: sharp, stabbing chest pain that is much worse when I breathe in deeply; the leg is swollen, warm and tender down the back of the calf
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the chest pain is severe and I'm breathing fast and shallow to avoid it; I feel like I can't get enough air
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right side of the chest and the whole right calf
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the chest pain and breathlessness are constant and getting worse since they started
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting very still and taking shallow breaths eases the stabbing a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: breathing in deeply, moving, and trying to walk
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: coughing up small streaks of fresh blood in the last hour; heart feels like it's racing
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: cannot walk across the room without severe pain and breathlessness; sitting rigidly upright

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: cancer that I'm currently having treatment for
past_medical_history.how_managed: under an oncology team, on active treatment

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; no one else is in the house right now

objective_data_offered.value: visibly breathless and distressed, breathing fast and shallow, holding the right side of the chest and wincing on each breath
right calf looks clearly more swollen than the left, with redness over the back of the lower leg
coughing up tissues with small streaks of fresh red blood; shows blood-stained tissues to the camera
right calf feels warm, tight and tender to touch compared with the other leg
